create.currencyHelp: Set once at creation and immutable after — see #202 for the currency-migration tool.
create.errorGeneric: Couldn't create the group. Please try again.
create.iconHelp: Optional — pick something to make the group easier to recognize in the sidebar.
create.subtitle: Set up your own inventory and invite others to it.
create.title: Create a new group

settings.currencyImmutableHelp: Set once at creation. A reprice-aware currency migration is tracked under #202.
settings.dangerDescription: Deleting this group permanently removes all locations, items, files, and exports. This cannot be undone.

deleteDialog.body: Type the group name and your current password to confirm. The name guards against accidental clicks; the password against a hijacked session.
deleteDialog.errorGeneric: Couldn't delete the group. Please try again.
deleteDialog.title: Delete {{name}}?

settings.errorGeneric: Couldn't save the group. Please try again.
settings.leaveDescription: You will lose access to all data in this group.
settings.leaveLastAdmin: You are the last admin of this group. Promote another member to admin before leaving — or delete the group below.
settings.leaveLastAdminTitle: You are the last admin. Promote another member first, or delete the group.
settings.slugHelp: Slugs are randomly generated at creation and immutable.
settings.subtitle: Manage your group's profile, members, and lifecycle.
settings.title: Group settings

validation.confirmWordRequired: Please type the group name to confirm
validation.currencyInvalid: Use a 3-letter ISO currency code (e.g. USD, EUR, CZK)
validation.iconUnknown: Pick an icon from the list
validation.nameTooLong: Group name must be 100 characters or fewer
